FAQ

What is MapMySpots?

A Telegram bot that turns travel recommendations — screenshots, guides, lists — into Google Maps links instantly.

Does it work with screenshots?

Yes. Send any screenshot with place names and the bot extracts them, finds addresses and returns map links.

What languages does it support?

Any language — Russian, English, Japanese, Chinese, Arabic. Tested and working in all of them.

Can it read TikTok or Instagram?

Yes. Screenshot any travel content and send it. The bot reads the image and extracts all places.

Can I export a full map?

Yes. Use /csv to export all places for Google My Maps. One click, everything pinned.

How much does it cost?

3 free uses, no card needed. After that — $19 for lifetime access. No subscription, ever.

Travel recs in.
Google Maps out.

Open the bot. Send one screenshot, travel list or forwarded message. Your Google Map is ready in seconds.
